summary: Comprehensive testing of Camp Management System Saveriani completed. Backend APIs fully functional (33/33 tests passed). Frontend UI working with minor React Select component error affecting form interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string - causing runtime errors in form dropdowns

integration_issues.issue: Logout button may not properly redirect to login page

passed_tests: Dashboard real-time clock and shift detection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Select component error: Ensure all Select.Item components have non-empty value props. This is causing runtime errors when users try to interact with dropdown forms in Diario, Pasti, Consegne, and Residenti modules.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor form interaction issues)
